sentences.en: The click-through rate on the banner dropped 40% due to ad fatigue.
sentences.zh: 由于广告疲劳，横幅广告的点击率下降了40%。

sentences.en: We should nurture dormant users with a re-engagement email series.
sentences.zh: 我们应该通过再激活邮件系列来培育沉睡用户。

sentences.en: The influencer campaign drove 5,000 downloads but only 800 completed registration.
sentences.zh: KOL活动带来了5000次下载，但只有800人完成注册。

sentences.en: User-generated content outperforms branded content in terms of trust and shareability.
sentences.zh: 就信任度和可分享性而言，用户生成内容优于品牌内容。

sentences.en: We need to tighten the feedback loop between marketing spend and revenue impact.
sentences.zh: 我们需要加强营销支出和收入影响之间的反馈闭环。

example.en: Rotating creative assets every two weeks helps prevent ad fatigue.
example.zh: 每两周轮换创意素材有助于防止广告疲劳。

example.en: We identified 50,000 dormant users who haven't logged in for 90 days.
example.zh: 我们识别出50000名90天未登录的沉睡用户。

example.en: The re-engagement campaign brought back 12% of inactive users.
example.zh: 再激活活动带回了12%的不活跃用户。

example.en: Encouraging user-generated content can lower your content production costs.
example.zh: 鼓励用户生成内容可以降低内容制作成本。

example.en: A tight feedback loop between data and decision-making improves agility.
example.zh: 数据和决策之间紧密的反馈闭环能提升敏捷性。

sentences.en: The API rate limit was exceeded during peak hours, causing service degradation.
sentences.zh: 高峰时段API速率限制被突破，导致服务降级。

sentences.en: We prioritized the backlog based on impact-effort scoring.
sentences.zh: 我们根据影响-工作量评分对需求池进行了优先级排序。

sentences.en: The heatmap shows that users rarely scroll past the first fold of the page.
sentences.zh: 热力图显示用户很少滚动到页面首屏以下。

sentences.en: A/B test results showed a statistically significant improvement in the variant group.
sentences.zh: A/B测试结果显示实验组有统计学上显著的改善。

sentences.en: The product spec was ambiguous, which led to different interpretations across teams.
sentences.zh: 产品规格文档含糊不清，导致各团队理解不一致。

example.en: We increased the API rate limit to handle the growing traffic.
example.zh: 我们提高了API速率限制以应对增长的流量。

example.en: The product backlog has over 200 items that need to be groomed.
example.zh: 产品需求池有超过200项待梳理的需求。

example.en: The heatmap revealed that the call-to-action button gets very few clicks.
example.zh: 热力图显示行动号召按钮的点击量非常少。

example.en: We need at least 10,000 samples for the result to be statistically significant.
example.zh: 我们至少需要10000个样本才能使结果具有统计学显著性。

example.en: Ambiguous requirements are the leading cause of rework in software projects.
example.zh: 模糊的需求是软件项目中返工的首要原因。

sentences.en: The central bank held interest rates steady, defying market expectations of a cut.
sentences.zh: 央行维持利率不变，与市场预期的降息相左。

sentences.en: Revenue per user increased by 12% after the premium tier was introduced.
sentences.zh: 推出高级会员后，每用户收入提高了12%。

sentences.en: The company's market capitalization surpassed $10 billion for the first time.
sentences.zh: 公司市值首次突破100亿美元。

sentences.en: Hedge funds are rotating out of tech stocks into defensive sectors.
sentences.zh: 对冲基金正在从科技股转向防御性板块。

sentences.en: The trailing twelve-month revenue grew 45% year-over-year.
sentences.zh: 过去十二个月的收入同比增长了45%。

example.en: Rising interest rates typically put downward pressure on growth stocks.
example.zh: 利率上升通常会对成长股构成下行压力。

example.en: Apple's market capitalization makes it the most valuable company in the world.
example.zh: 苹果的市值使其成为全球最有价值的公司。

example.en: Hedge funds use complex strategies to generate returns in any market condition.
example.zh: 对冲基金使用复杂策略在任何市场条件下获取收益。

example.en: Utilities and healthcare are considered defensive sectors during downturns.
example.zh: 公用事业和医疗保健在经济下行时被视为防御性板块。

example.en: Trailing twelve-month revenue is a common measure for evaluating recent performance.
example.zh: 过去十二个月的收入是评估近期表现的常用指标。

sentences.en: The team velocity has stabilized at 40 story points per sprint.
sentences.zh: 团队速率已稳定在每个冲刺40个故事点。

sentences.en: We need to set clear boundaries between work time and personal time for remote workers.
sentences.zh: 我们需要为远程员工在工作时间和个人时间之间设定明确界限。

sentences.en: The competency matrix helps identify skill gaps across the engineering team.
sentences.zh: 能力矩阵帮助识别工程团队的技能缺口。

sentences.en: I want to empower the team to make decisions without waiting for my approval.
sentences.zh: 我希望赋能团队自主决策，而不是等待我的批准。

sentences.en: The attrition rate in Q1 was 8%, which is above our target of 5%.
sentences.zh: Q1的离职率为8%，高于我们5%的目标。

example.en: Team velocity helps us predict how much work we can deliver in a sprint.
example.zh: 团队速率帮助我们预测一个冲刺能交付多少工作量。

example.en: The competency matrix maps each team member's skill level across key areas.
example.zh: 能力矩阵标记了每个团队成员在关键领域的技能水平。

example.en: Leaders who empower their teams see higher engagement and innovation.
example.zh: 赋能团队的领导者能看到更高的参与度和创新。

example.en: High attrition in engineering is often caused by lack of growth opportunities.
example.zh: 工程团队的高流失率通常是缺乏成长机会导致的。

example.en: We estimate task complexity using story points rather than hours.
example.zh: 我们用故事点而不是工时来估算任务复杂度。

sentences.en: The winner-take-all dynamic in this market favors the player with the largest user base.
sentences.zh: 这个市场的赢者通吃格局有利于用户基数最大的玩家。

sentences.en: We should conduct a scenario analysis to stress-test our three-year plan.
sentences.zh: 我们应该进行情景分析来压力测试我们的三年计划。

sentences.en: The adjacency strategy allows us to expand into related verticals with low risk.
sentences.zh: 邻接战略让我们能以低风险扩展到相关垂直领域。

sentences.en: Our pricing power comes from the switching cost embedded in the product.
sentences.zh: 我们的定价权来自产品内嵌的转换成本。

sentences.en: The joint venture in Singapore gives us a local license without building from scratch.
sentences.zh: 在新加坡的合资企业使我们无需从零开始就能获得本地牌照。

example.en: Platform businesses tend to create winner-take-all markets.
example.zh: 平台型企业往往会形成赢者通吃的市场格局。

example.en: Scenario analysis helps the board prepare for both best-case and worst-case outcomes.
example.zh: 情景分析帮助董事会为最佳和最差结果做好准备。

example.en: Expanding into adjacencies leverages your existing capabilities.
example.zh: 向相邻领域扩展可以利用你现有的能力。

example.en: High switching costs make it difficult for users to leave for a competitor.
example.zh: 高转换成本使用户难以转向竞争对手。

example.en: The joint venture combines our technology with their local market expertise.
example.zh: 合资企业将我们的技术与他们的本地市场专长结合起来。
